summary: Portfolio Manager Foundation (Iteration 1) validated via live HTTP against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. 53/53 backend tests PASS. All 4 CRUD groups (time-commitments, financial-accounts, monthly-money-commitments, resource-allocations) verified for create/read/update/delete + strict enum & shape validation. Derived endpoints (daily/weekly time-capacity, monthly money-position) verified for correctness including union-not-double-count for overlapping intervals and zeroed response for empty-currency month. User isolation across all 4 collections confirmed. Existing surface (/api/auth/me, /api/domains, /api/goals, /api/tasks, /api/checkins, /api/knowledge/journeys create+list) regressed clean, confirming the deps.py extraction did not break existing routes. No blocking bugs found; no code changes made.
action_items: OPTIONAL: portfolio_manager.py is ~1120 lines. If further growth is planned (scheduler, recommender), consider splitting into submodules: models.py / validators.py / router_time.py / router_money.py / router_allocations.py / derived.py.
OPTIONAL: deps.get_current_user does a lazy import of server on every request. Fine at current scale; if profiling shows overhead, cache the resolved callable in a module-level slot after first call.
critical_code_review_comments: compute_time_union_and_overlap correctness verified end-to-end: intervals 08:00-10:00 + 09:00-11:00 + 23:00-23:59 produced committed=239, overlap=60 as expected. Good.
resource_allocations validator strictly enforces owner_type ∈ {task, project, knowledge_journey, standalone} — 'goal' returns 400 as required. Cross-verified.

financial_accounts stores liabilities with positive current_value; money-position correctly excludes them from opening_liquid_assets via `account_type: {$in: ASSET_ACCOUNT_TYPES}`. Verified: credit_card 1200 not counted in USD opening balance.
money-position on a currency with no data returns all zeros and available=0 (not an error). Good UX default.
Weekly capacity strictly requires Monday (weekday()==0) — non-Monday returns 400 with a clear message. Confirmed with 2026-01-06 (Tue).

deps.py lazy import correctly breaks the potential circular import between server.py and portfolio_manager.py. Existing routes (domains/goals/tasks/checkins/knowledge/journeys) all still work post-extraction.
MINOR: portfolio_manager.py imports `validator` from pydantic (line 29) but never uses it. Dead import; harmless.
MINOR: `time` import in test file unused pattern — not a product concern.
Auth guard: unauthenticated GET on /api/portfolio/time-commitments returns 401/403 as expected (OAuth2PasswordBearer).
seed_data_creation: Each test module run signs up two fresh TEST_pm_<uuid>@example.com users; all created rows are prefixed TEST_ and are naturally isolated by user_id. No shared/production data touched. One TEST_regress_kj knowledge journey is created per run under the throwaway user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live-HTTP portfolio suite is /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_live.py — self-contained, uses only public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, signs up fresh users, no external fixtures required. Run: `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_live.py -v`. Endpoints covered: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE on /api/portfolio/{time-commitments, financial-accounts, monthly-money-commitments, resource-allocations}; GET /api/portfolio/time-capacity/day?date=YYYY-MM-DD; GET /api/portfolio/time-capacity/week?week_start_date=YYYY-MM-DD (Monday required); GET /api/portfolio/money-position?month=YYYY-MM&currency=USD. Regression: /api/auth/me, /api/domains, /api/goals, /api/tasks, /api/checkins, /api/knowledge/journeys (POST+GET). Enums to remember: owner_type ∈ {task, project, knowledge_journey, standalone} (goal is REJECTED); day_of_week is lowercase english weekday name; times HH:mm no cross-midnight; months YYYY-MM; currency ISO 4217 3-letter uppercase.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all 53 live HTTP checks passed on first run.
